environments.label: Production
environments.notes: Live customer-facing runtime. Promotion and destructive actions require explicit approval.

environments.label: Staging
environments.notes: Pre-production validation lane. Promotion into production originates here.

environments.label: Lab
environments.notes: Shared experimentation and hardening environment for supervised backend work.

environments.label: Sandbox
environments.notes: Isolated execution area for bounded experimentation and verification.

environments.label: Scratch
environments.notes: Disposable workspace for temporary work and preflight experimentation.
